Ossi Mens Belt for Jeans This Ossi 38mm belt is just perfect for jeans and is available for a huge range of waist sizes (28", 30", 32", 34", 36", 38", 40", 42", 44", 46", 48", 50", 52", 54", 56", 58", 60"). It has a smooth roller buckle so the belt doesn't rub and has a classic block edged finish. · Available for waist sizes from 28" - 60", please ensure you look at the size guide below to get the perfect fit. · Available in 3 colours which look great with jeans; a traditional black, rich brown and a deep tan. · Made with 40 years experience by Ossi · Leather Lined (28" - 48"), Bonded Leather (48" - 60") · Strong and Durable · 38mm Wide Strap with Roller Buckle Made with Comfort in Mind 7 Sizing Holes Ossi have now put 7 holes in these belts to ensure greater comfort and size flexibility. Roller Design Buckle Silver in colour and designed with comfort in mind and ease of use. The belt strap will pull through smoothly.
